calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard L. Beckman, Esq. for plaintiff Anna Guerra
John G.Hanlin, Esq. for defendants David Louie and Hong Xian You
JPT: R. Warren
Brenda Fields, CSR # 7235

This cause came on regulary for jury trial. The matter has settled, after having being sent to judge pro tem. The terms of the settlement are as follows:

The defendant is to surrender the premises located at 2474 38th Avenue San Francisco, CA 94116 on or before 10:00am on February 1, 2007.

Restitution of the premises, noted above, shall be awarded to plaintiff Ann Guerra.

Defendant Anna Guerra, shall pay to the plaintiff, David Louie the sum of $25,000.00 within 7 days of todays date . Within three court days of the receipt of the $25,000.00, plaintiffs in the matter of Louie v Guerra, Case # 455541 will file a dismissal and release the lis pendens.

In the matter of Guerra v Louie, cse # 618845 Plaintiff, Anna Guerra shall pay to defendant, David Louie the sum of $30,000.00 on February 1, 2007 upon the surrender of keys to the premises.

All parties agree and concur to the terms of the settlement agreement placed on the record.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Continued To Oct-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
